item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Debt Collection Reform
item.description:
👀 Debt Collection Reform

FDCPA modernization 119th Congress: medical-debt-credit-reporting protections · debt-buyer documentation requirements · digital-communication standards · cooperative-class debt-collection exemptions. Composes with #7 MSA + Cooperative Finance Trio + Overdraft Fee Cap. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
